title: Redirect unauthenticated visitors from root to login
description: Verifies that visiting the root route without an authenticated session sends the user to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Sign in and access todo list
description: A returning user can sign in with valid credentials and is redirected to their todo list page.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Login User into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a password with at least 8 characters into the password field
Submit the registration form
Click the logout control
Navigate to /login
Fill the same email address into the email field
Fill the same password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the todos page

title: Block unauthenticated access to the todo list page
description: Verifies that attempting to access the todo list page without a session redirects the user to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /todos
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Create account and land on todo list
description: A new visitor can register with valid details and is signed in and redirected to their todo list page.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a password with at least 8 characters into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify the user lands on the todos page

title: Add a new todo and place it at the top
description: Verifies that submitting a non-empty todo title creates the todo and it appears at the top of the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the todo list page to finish loading
Create a new todo with title Todo A
Create a new todo with title Todo B
Verify the most recently added todo appears at the top of the list

title: Save edited todo title via Enter
description: Verifies a user can edit a todo title inline and save it so the updated title appears in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to add a new todo
Fill Todo to edit into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Enter edit mode for the todo title
Fill Updated todo title into the inline title input
Press Enter
Verify the todo list displays an item with title Updated todo title

title: Display todos after page load for an authenticated user
description: Verifies that after logging in, the todo list loads and shows the user's existing todos.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the todo list page to finish loading
Create a new todo with a unique title
Refresh the page
Verify the todo list displays at least one todo item

title: Delete a todo after revealing delete control
description: Verifies a user can reveal the delete control for a todo and remove the item from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to add a new todo
Fill Todo to delete into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Reveal the delete control for the Todo to delete item by hovering over it
Activate delete for that todo
Verify the todo with title Todo to delete is not present in the todo list

title: Clear completed removes only completed items
description: User can clear all completed todos at once and only completed items are removed while active items remain visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Fill Todo A into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Fill Todo B into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Toggle completion for Todo A
Trigger the clear completed action
Verify completed todo items are not shown in the list
Verify at least one active todo item remains visible in the list

title: End session and return to login
description: An authenticated user can log out and is redirected back to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the logout control
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Mark a todo as completed
description: Verifies that toggling a todo marks it completed and the UI reflects completed state with a strikethrough.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the todo list page to finish loading
Create a new todo with a unique title
Toggle completion for the newly created todo
Verify the todo is displayed as completed with strikethrough text

title: Save edited todo title via blur
description: Verifies a user can edit a todo title inline and save it by clicking away so the updated title remains visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to add a new todo
Fill Blur save todo into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Enter edit mode for the todo title
Fill Blur saved title into the inline title input
Click outside the inline edit input to blur
Verify the todo list displays an item with title Blur saved title

title: Show empty state when the user has no todos
description: Verifies that a newly registered user is taken to the todo list and sees an empty state when no todos exist.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill a new name into the name field
Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password (8+ characters) into the password field
Submit the registration form
Wait for the todo list page to finish loading
Verify an empty state message is visible

title: Clear completed works with multiple completed todos
description: User can clear multiple completed todos in one action and they are all removed from the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Fill Completed One into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Fill Completed Two into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Toggle completion for Completed One
Toggle completion for Completed Two
Trigger the clear completed action
Verify completed todo items are not shown in the list
Verify the todo list is empty or contains only active items

title: View all todos under All filter
description: Verifies selecting the All filter shows both active and completed todos together.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to add a new todo
Fill Active item into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Click to add a new todo
Fill Completed item into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Toggle the Completed item todo to completed
Select the All filter
Verify both active and completed todos are displayed in the list

title: View only incomplete todos under Active filter
description: Verifies selecting the Active filter shows only incomplete todos and hides completed ones.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to add a new todo
Fill Active only item into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Click to add a new todo
Fill Will be completed into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Toggle the Will be completed todo to completed
Select the Active filter
Verify only incomplete todos are displayed in the list

title: Uncomplete a completed todo
description: Verifies that toggling a completed todo makes it active again and removes the completed visual styling.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the todo list page to finish loading
Create a new todo with a unique title
Toggle completion for the newly created todo to mark it completed
Toggle completion for the same todo again to mark it active
Verify the todo is displayed as active without strikethrough text

title: Clear completed does not remove active todos even when many exist
description: User clearing completed items does not affect active todos even when the list contains several active items.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Fill Active 1 into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Fill Active 2 into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Fill To Complete into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Toggle completion for To Complete
Trigger the clear completed action
Verify at least two active todo items are visible in the list
Verify completed todo items are not shown in the list

title: Delete one todo without affecting others
description: Verifies deleting a single todo removes only that item while other todos remain visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to add a new todo
Fill Keep me into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Click to add a new todo
Fill Remove me into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Reveal the delete control for the Remove me item by hovering over it
Activate delete for that todo
Verify the todo list displays an item with title Keep me
Verify the todo with title Remove me is not present in the todo list

title: Clear completed control appears after completing a todo
description: User sees the clear completed control appear once at least one todo is marked completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Fill Will Complete into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Toggle completion for Will Complete
Verify the clear completed control is visible

title: View only completed todos and see active count badge
description: Verifies selecting the Completed filter shows only completed todos and the Active tab shows the remaining active count badge.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to add a new todo
Fill One active item into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Click to add a new todo
Fill One completed item into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Toggle the One completed item todo to completed
Select the Completed filter
Verify only completed todos are displayed in the list
Verify the Active filter shows a badge with count 1

title: Cancel edited todo title via Escape
description: Verifies a user can cancel an inline title edit and the original title remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click to add a new todo
Fill Original title into the new todo title field
Press Enter
Enter edit mode for the todo title
Fill Attempted new title into the inline title input
Press Escape
Verify the todo list displays an item with title Original title

title: Clear completed control is hidden when no completed todos exist
description: User does not see the clear completed control when there are no completed todos.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Fill Only Active into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Verify the clear completed control is not visible

title: Clear completed is unavailable after clearing all completed items
description: After clearing, the user no longer has access to the clear completed control because there are no completed todos left.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Fill Done 1 into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo
Toggle completion for Done 1
Trigger the clear completed action
Verify the clear completed control is not visible

title: Reject duplicate email during registration
description: A visitor cannot register with an email that is already in use and sees a duplicate-email error.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill First User into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a password with at least 8 characters into the password field
Submit the registration form
Click the logout control
Navigate to /register
Fill Second User into the name field
Fill the same email address into the email field
Fill a password with at least 8 characters into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a duplicate email error is visible

title: Show error on invalid login credentials
description: A visitor who enters invalid credentials cannot sign in and sees an invalid-credentials error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill invalid@example.com into the email field
Fill wrongpassword into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Prevent creating a todo with an empty title
description: Verifies that submitting an empty todo title is blocked and no new todo is added.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Wait for the todo list page to finish loading
Count the number of todos currently displayed
Fill an empty value into the new todo title field
Submit the new todo form
Verify the number of todos displayed does not increase

title: Enforce minimum password length on registration
description: A visitor cannot register with a password shorter than the minimum length and sees a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /register
Fill Test User into the name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a password shorter than 8 characters into the password field
Submit the registration form
Verify a password length validation error is visible

title: Loan admin can log in and reach dashboard
description: Admin user logs in at /loan/login with valid credentials and is redirected to /loan/dashboard showing stats cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login
Fill admin@loanapp.com into the email field
Fill Admin@1234 into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on /loan/dashboard
Verify at least one stat card is visible on the dashboard

title: Unauthenticated access to loan dashboard redirects to login
description: Verifies that visiting /loan/dashboard without a session redirects to /loan/login.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/dashboard without being logged in
Verify the user lands on /loan/login

title: Admin can create a new loan
description: Admin selects a customer, fills in principal, rate, term, and submits the new loan form, landing on the loan detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/loans/new
Select a customer from the Customer dropdown
Fill 100000 into the Principal field
Fill 5 into the Annual Interest Rate field
Select 12 months from the Term dropdown
Fill Home renovation into the Purpose field
Submit the form
Verify the user lands on the loan detail page showing the loan number
Verify the loan status is pending

title: Loan list shows all loans and can filter by status
description: Admin visits /loan/loans and verifies loans are listed; clicking 'pending' filter shows only pending loans.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/loans
Verify at least one row is visible in the loans table
Click the pending filter button
Verify all visible rows show the pending status badge

title: Admin can approve a pending loan
description: From the loan detail page, admin clicks Approve on a pending loan and the status changes to active.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/loans and click View on a pending loan
Click the Approve button
Verify the loan status badge changes to active
Verify the Approve and Reject buttons are no longer visible

title: Admin can reject a pending loan
description: From the loan detail page, admin clicks Reject on a pending loan and the status changes to rejected.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/loans and click View on a pending loan
Click the Reject button
Verify the loan status badge changes to rejected

title: Customer can record a payment with a slip
description: A logged-in customer navigates to /loan/payments/new, selects an active loan, enters an amount, uploads a slip image, and submits.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/payments/new
Select an active loan from the Loan dropdown
Verify the Amount field is pre-filled with the monthly payment
Upload a sample image file as the payment slip
Submit the payment form
Verify the user lands on the payment detail page
Verify the payment status is pending

title: Admin can approve a pending payment
description: Admin views a pending payment detail page, clicks Approve Payment, and the status changes to approved.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/payments and click View on a pending payment
Click the Approve Payment button
Verify the payment status badge changes to approved
Verify the Approve and Reject buttons are no longer visible

title: Admin can reject a payment with a reason
description: Admin views a pending payment, clicks Reject Payment, enters a reason, confirms, and the status changes to rejected.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/payments and click View on a pending payment
Click the Reject Payment button
Fill Insufficient slip evidence into the reason textarea
Click Confirm Reject
Verify the payment status badge changes to rejected
Verify the reject reason text is displayed on the page

title: Admin can create a new customer user
description: Admin fills the new user form at /loan/users/new with role=customer and the user appears in the customers list.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/users/new
Fill Test Customer into the Full Name field
Fill a unique email into the Email field
Fill Password@123 into the Password field
Select customer from the Role dropdown
Submit the form
Verify the user is redirected to /loan/customers
Verify the new customer name appears in the customer list

title: Customer role cannot see Users nav item
description: A user with the customer role should not see the Users navigation link in the sidebar.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as a customer account
Verify the Users nav item is not visible in the sidebar
Verify the Customers nav item is not visible in the sidebar

title: Dashboard charts render after login
description: Admin logs in and the dashboard shows both the Monthly Collections bar chart and Loan Status pie chart.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/dashboard
Verify the Monthly Collections chart heading is visible
Verify the Loan Status Distribution chart heading is visible

title: Loan detail shows amortization schedule
description: Viewing a loan detail page shows the amortization schedule table with installment rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/loans and click View on an active loan
Verify the Amortization Schedule section heading is visible
Verify at least one row is visible in the schedule table

title: Loan admin can log out and is returned to login
description: An authenticated loan admin clicks Logout in the sidebar and is redirected back to /loan/login.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Click the Logout button in the sidebar
Verify the user lands on /loan/login

title: New loan form shows estimated monthly payment preview
description: When principal, rate, and term are filled in on the new loan form, a live monthly payment estimate is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/loans/new
Fill 120000 into the Principal field
Fill 6 into the Annual Interest Rate field
Select 24 months from the Term dropdown
Verify an Estimated Monthly Payment section is visible showing a non-zero value

title: Payments list can be filtered by approved status
description: Admin navigates to /loan/payments, clicks the approved filter, and only approved payments are visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/payments
Click the approved filter button
Verify all visible payment rows show the approved status badge

title: Invalid loan login shows error message
description: Submitting wrong credentials on /loan/login displays an error and does not redirect.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login
Fill wrong@email.com into the email field
Fill badpassword into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an error message is visible on the page
Verify the URL remains /loan/login

title: Admin can deactivate a user
description: Admin visits /loan/users and clicks Deactivate on an active user; the status badge changes to Inactive.

steps.description: Navigate to /loan/login and log in as admin@loanapp.com / Admin@1234
Navigate to /loan/users
Find an Active user row and click Deactivate
Verify the user's status badge changes to Inactive
